case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NANCY Y BANEGAS ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $731.81 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NANCY BENEGAS ESPINOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2019 - SOFIA REYES AS LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE, THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-01-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,755.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BANEGAS ESPINOZA, NANCY Y
